description: Comprehensive knowledge base for Indian CV/Resume creation (2025-2026)

ats_optimization.description: Critical rules to pass ATS screening - 75% of Indian resumes are rejected by ATS before reaching human recruiters
ats_optimization.ai_screening_adoption: 45% of Indian companies now use AI tools for resume screening
ats_optimization.save_format_note: Use .docx unless employer specifically requests PDF

layout.columns: Never use multi-column layouts - ATS cannot parse them
layout.whitespace: Adequate spacing between sections for readability

avoid: Graphics, icons, or images (except photo if required)
must_have: Standard section headings (Work Experience, Education, Skills, etc.)
Keywords from job description naturally incorporated
Both acronyms and full forms (e.g., 'AI' and 'Artificial Intelligence')
Standard date format (MM/YYYY or Month YYYY)

keyword_strategy.placement: Incorporate keywords naturally in summary, skills, and experience sections
keyword_strategy.variations: Include both abbreviations and full terms
examples: AI, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, ML
AWS, Amazon Web Services, Cloud Computing
keyword_strategy.industry_terms: Use exact terminology from job posting

compatibility_tips.check_parsing: Use ATS checker tools before submission
compatibility_tips.readability: Ensure text is selectable (not in images)

max_pages.freshers: 1 page (strictly for undergrads and new graduates)

optional: Date of Birth (only if employer requires)

freshers.content: State career goals, key skills, and aspirations
freshers.example: Seeking a software developer position where I can apply my Python and data analytics skills to build innovative solutions, while contributing to team success and professional growth

experienced.content: Highlight achievements, years of experience, key strengths
experienced.example: Results-driven marketing manager with 5+ years driving 30% sales growth through data-driven campaigns. Expertise in digital marketing, SEO, and team leadership. Proven track record of managing ₹2Cr+ budgets and delivering ROI-focused strategies

experience.format: Job Title | Company Name | Location | MM/YYYY - MM/YYYY
experience.style: Start with action verbs, no pronouns
experience.quantify: Include numbers, percentages, rupee amounts, team sizes
experience.focus: Results and business impact over responsibilities
examples: Led team of 5 to automate process, reducing errors by 40% and saving 200 man-hours monthly
Increased revenue by 25% through implementation of targeted B2B sales strategy
Managed portfolio worth ₹10 crore, achieving 95% client retention rate

education.importance: Highly emphasized for freshers and new graduates
education.include_grades: Always include if good (7.5+ CGPA or 75%+ percentage)
education.school_marks: Include Class X and XII marks (common in India)
education.additional: Mention honors, ranks, scholarships, relevant coursework
education.example: B.Tech in Computer Science | IIT Delhi | New Delhi | 2024 | CGPA: 8.5/10

skills.prominence: Separate dedicated section - highly valued by Indian recruiters

structure.technical_first: List hard skills prominently (programming, tools, software)
structure.soft_skills_after: Follow with soft skills (communication, teamwork, leadership)

format_options: Grouped by category (Programming Languages, Tools, Frameworks)
examples: Technical: Python, Java, AWS, Docker, SQL, React, Machine Learning, Git
Business: SAP FICO, Tally, QuickBooks, Financial Analysis, Excel, Power BI
Soft Skills: Leadership, Team Management, Problem Solving, Communication

projects.importance: Critical for freshers to demonstrate practical skills
projects.description: 2-3 lines explaining objective, approach, and outcome
projects.quantify: Include metrics where possible (users, performance improvement, etc.)
projects.example:
E-commerce Recommendation System | Python, TensorFlow, Flask | Jan 2024 - Apr 2024
Developed ML-based product recommendation engine achieving 85% accuracy. Improved user engagement by 40% through personalized suggestions. Deployed on AWS with scalable architecture.

certifications.value: Highly valued in Indian job market
certifications.priority: List industry-recognized certifications (Google, AWS, Microsoft, etc.)
examples: AWS Certified Solutions Architect | Amazon Web Services | Sep 2024
Certified Scrum Master (CSM) | Scrum Alliance | Mar 2024

languages.value: Important for multilingual roles and client-facing positions
languages.specify: Reading, Writing, Speaking abilities if relevant
languages.example: Hindi - Native | English - Professional Proficiency | Tamil - Conversational

modern_practice.recommendation: Omit most personal information for corporate roles
modern_practice.avoid: Photo, DOB, gender, marital status, religion unless requested
modern_practice.reason: Prevent bias and follow global best practices

traditional_practice.context: Still common in some sectors and smaller companies
traditional_practice.includes: Photo, DOB, father's name, marital status, religion, nationality
traditional_practice.declining: Modern Indian companies moving away from this

government_psu_mandatory.declaration_text: I hereby declare that all the information provided above is true and correct to the best of my knowledge.
government_psu_mandatory.format: Follow specific format mentioned in government job notification

photo_guidelines.private_sector: Generally omit unless role requires (acting, security) or specifically requested
photo_guidelines.tech_companies: Most follow global practice - no photo

sector_specific.consulting: Professional photo optional, emphasis on achievements

emphasis: Technologies and tools (AWS, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes)
example_bullets: Developed RESTful APIs using Node.js serving 100K+ daily requests with 99.9% uptime
Implemented ML model using Python and TensorFlow achieving 92% accuracy
Migrated 50+ applications to AWS, reducing infrastructure costs by 35%

emphasis: Financial qualifications (MBA Finance, CFA, FRM, CA)
Banking/accounting software (Tally, SAP FICO, Oracle Financials)
example_bullets: Managed portfolio worth ₹10 crore achieving 18% annual returns
Reduced loan processing time by 20% through workflow automation
Ensured 100% compliance with RBI guidelines across 50+ audits

emphasis: Medical qualifications and licenses (MBBS, MD, nursing degrees)
Registrations (MCI/NMC for doctors, state nursing council)
example_bullets: Managed care for 500+ patients monthly maintaining 95% satisfaction rating
Published 3 research papers in peer-reviewed journals with 50+ citations
Implemented telemedicine program reaching 1000+ rural patients

emphasis: Core technical skills (CAD software, PLC programming, machinery)
example_bullets: Designed hydraulic system using AutoCAD improving efficiency by 15%
Implemented Six Sigma methodology reducing defects by 35%
Optimized production line increasing output by 20% while reducing costs by ₹10L annually

emphasis: Digital marketing tools (Google Analytics, CRM, social media)
example_bullets: Grew territory sales by 40% managing key accounts worth ₹5 Cr annually
Launched digital campaign boosting user engagement by 72% and generating 500+ qualified leads
Increased social media following by 150% and improved conversion rate by 25%
Founded startup and raised ₹50L seed funding from angel investors
Scaled user base from 0 to 10,000 in 12 months with 30% MoM growth
Led product development resulting in ₹2M ARR within first year
Led consulting project for Fortune 500 client resulting in 15% cost reduction (₹50Cr savings)
Analyzed market entry strategy for fintech startup entering 3 new markets
Won national case competition competing against 200+ teams from top B-schools

education_research.format: Can be 2-3 pages with publications list
example_bullets: Published 8 research papers in Q1 journals with cumulative impact factor of 25+
Secured ₹15L research grant from SERB for AI in healthcare project
Taught Data Structures and Algorithms to 200+ undergraduate students with 95% pass rate

visual_principles.layout: Single or two-column with clear hierarchy
visual_principles.colors: Conservative - navy, dark green, dark gray, maroon as accent only
visual_principles.graphics: Avoid for corporate roles; acceptable only in creative fields

typography.body_fonts: Sans-serif (Arial, Calibri, Lato) for body text
typography.heading_fonts: Same font family, larger size or bold weight
typography.consistency: One font family throughout with bold/italic for emphasis
typography.avoid: Script fonts, novelty fonts, multiple font families

color_usage.usage: Headers, section dividers, or subtle highlights only
color_usage.avoid: Bright colors, multiple colors, full-color backgrounds
color_usage.monochrome: Most Indian recruiters expect mostly black-and-white CVs

traditional.description: Formal, single-column, no photo, plain text
traditional.preferred_by: Large firms, banks, manufacturing, professional services

modern.description: Clean design with optional headshot, stylized sections, subtle color
modern.ats_friendly: Must ensure no complex graphics or embedded text
modern.elements: Sidebar possible if ATS-friendly, bold section headers, subtle dividers

creative.description: Infographic elements, visual hierarchy, designer templates

template_recommendations.characteristics: One-column structure, distinct headers, readable fonts
template_recommendations.avoid: Overly decorative templates with graphics and icons

ats_vs_visual.priority: ATS compatibility over visual flair for corporate roles
ats_vs_visual.balance: Subtle modern touches while maintaining ATS readability
ats_vs_visual.test: Always test with ATS checker before submission

technology: Data Science and Big Data Analytics
industry_specific: Healthcare: Clinical Skills, Telemedicine, Healthcare Analytics
Finance: Risk Management, Compliance, Financial Modeling

soft_skills.demonstration: Show through achievements, not just listing - e.g., 'Led cross-functional team of 12' shows leadership

emerging_skills_2026.recommendation: List certifications or courses in emerging areas with specific project examples

professional_tone.tense: Past tense for previous roles, present tense for current role

indian_english_conventions.spelling: Use British spellings common in Indian English
indian_english_conventions.vocabulary: Formal vocabulary appropriate for professional context
indian_english_conventions.idioms: Avoid overly American idioms unless applying to American MNC

action_verb_usage.rule: Start every bullet point with strong action verb

quantification_importance.rule: Always quantify achievements with specific metrics
examples: Strong: Improved system performance by 35% reducing response time from 5s to 3s
Strong: Led cross-functional team of 12 members across 3 departments
Strong: Increased regional sales by 40% generating ₹5 Cr additional revenue

clarity_and_brevity.sentence_length: Keep bullet points concise - 1-2 lines maximum
clarity_and_brevity.structure: Use parallel structure for all bullets in a section
clarity_and_brevity.avoid: Paragraphs of text - use bullet points throughout
clarity_and_brevity.focus: One clear achievement or responsibility per bullet
clarity_and_brevity.readability: Easy to scan and understand in 6-10 seconds per section

bilingual_considerations.english_proficiency: All resumes should be in professional English
bilingual_considerations.language_section: List Hindi, English, and regional languages separately
bilingual_considerations.client_facing_roles: Emphasize multilingual ability if relevant to role
bilingual_considerations.value: Bilingual skills increasingly important for customer-facing and regional roles

critical_errors: Spelling and grammatical mistakes (recruiters very strict)
Lying about experience, education, or skills (verification is common)
Too long (exceeding 2 pages for experienced, 1 page for freshers)
Poor formatting or difficult to read
Missing contact information or broken LinkedIn links
content_mistakes: Too much personal information (when not required)

verification_concerns.background_checks: Indian companies increasingly verify education and employment
verification_concerns.education_fraud: Never lie about degrees, universities, or grades
verification_concerns.employment_dates: Ensure dates match with background check
verification_concerns.skills_verification: Only list skills you can demonstrate in interviews

TCS: Emphasized programming languages and cloud technologies
Quantified project impact with specific metrics
Clean, ATS-friendly format with strong technical section

common_success_elements.tailoring: Customized to match job description keywords and requirements
common_success_elements.quantification: Every achievement backed by numbers and data
common_success_elements.relevance: Focused on what company needs, omitting irrelevant details
common_success_elements.clarity: Clean format with bullet points and consistent structure
common_success_elements.keywords: Natural incorporation of industry and role-specific terms

cover_letter.importance: Highly encouraged for professional roles in India
cover_letter.length: 3-4 short paragraphs (half page to one page)
structure: Opening: Position and how you found it
Body 1: Why you're a great fit (match skills to requirements)
Body 2: What you bring (key achievements and value)
Closing: Enthusiasm and call to action
use_cases: Expand on key achievements from resume
cover_letter.customization: Always tailor to specific company and role

linkedin_profile.alignment: Must match resume in titles, dates, and achievements
linkedin_profile.photo: Professional photograph required on LinkedIn (unlike resume)
linkedin_profile.headline: More than job title - include key skills and value proposition
linkedin_profile.summary: Expanded version of resume summary (150-300 words)
linkedin_profile.experience: Mirror resume format with bullet points
linkedin_profile.endorsements: Seek endorsements for key skills from colleagues
linkedin_profile.recommendations: Request recommendations from managers and clients
linkedin_profile.importance: Indian recruiters expect LinkedIn profile and check for consistency

relevance.tech: GitHub repos, personal website, project demos
relevance.writing: Medium blog, published articles, content samples

portfolio_websites.curation: Show 2-3 best, most relevant examples only
portfolio_websites.qr_codes: QR codes linking to portfolio gaining popularity (optional)

video_resume.status: Still niche in India - mainly creative/media sectors
video_resume.usage: Supplement only, never replace formal resume

certifications.validity: Mention expiry dates for time-bound certifications
certifications.digital_badges: Include links to verifiable digital credentials (Credly, Coursera)
certifications.priority: List only relevant, recent, recognized certifications

national_career_service.alignment: Government scheme integration for skill development roles

NSDC.name: National Skill Development Corporation
NSDC.certifications: Recognized across retail, hospitality, healthcare sectors
NSDC.resume_addition: List NSDC certifications with NSQF level
NSDC.credibility: Government backing adds weight to profile

government_job_requirements.biodata_format: Strict format specified in job notification
mandatory_elements: Educational qualifications with all mark sheets
Two references with full contact details
government_job_requirements.submission: Often physical submission or specific online portals

primary_factors: Skills match with job requirements (highest priority)

ats_human_balance.ats_screening: 75% of resumes filtered by ATS before human review
ats_human_balance.human_review: Focuses on achievements, cultural fit, communication
ats_human_balance.optimization_strategy: Pass ATS first, then impress humans with results

cultural_considerations.indian_business_context: Understanding of Indian market and business environment valued
cultural_considerations.hierarchy_awareness: Respect for organizational structure and reporting lines
cultural_considerations.long_term_potential: Companies look for commitment and growth trajectory
cultural_considerations.family_values: Stability and loyalty still valued in traditional sectors

hiring_trends.skill_based_hiring: 70% of employers prioritize skills over degrees
hiring_trends.remote_work: Hybrid and remote options normalized post-pandemic
hiring_trends.ai_recruitment: 45% companies use AI for resume screening
hiring_trends.gig_economy: Growing acceptance of freelance and contract work

future_outlook.skill_evolution: 70% of job skills expected to change by 2030
future_outlook.technology_integration: AI and automation reshaping all industries
future_outlook.emphasis: Showcase both current competencies and learning agility

ats_optimization: ✓ Saved in .docx or ATS-compatible PDF format
✓ Single-column layout with standard fonts (Arial, Calibri, Times New Roman)
✓ 8-12 relevant keywords from job description incorporated naturally
✓ No tables, graphics, or complex formatting
✓ All text is selectable (not embedded in images)
content_optimization: ✓ All bullet points start with action verbs
✓ Quantified achievements with specific numbers and percentages
✓ Complete contact information with LinkedIn profile
cultural_adaptation: ✓ Photo included/excluded based on sector (exclude for tech/corporate, include for government)
✓ Regional language skills mentioned for relevant roles
✓ Date format consistent (MM/YYYY or Month YYYY)

technical_review: ✓ ATS compatibility tested using online tools (Jobscan, Resume Worded)
✓ Grammar and spelling verified through Grammarly or similar
✓ PDF renders correctly on different devices
content_validation: ✓ All achievement claims verifiable and accurate
✓ Dates and employment history consistent with LinkedIn

customization: ✓ Job description analyzed for key requirements
✓ Resume tailored with relevant keywords for each application
✓ Cover letter personalized for specific company
follow_up: ✓ Interview preparation aligned with resume claims
✓ Company research completed for cultural fit

ats_checkers: Jobscan - ATS compatibility and keyword optimization
LinkedIn Resume Builder - Free basic ATS check
Zety Resume Checker - Formatting and content analysis
learning_platforms: Naukri Learning - Indian job market focused
UpGrad - Indian higher education and upskilling
job_portals: LinkedIn Jobs - Professional networking and jobs
Indeed India - Global with India focus
